message:
fix(sysconf): query runtime limits instead of POSIX minimums (bd-cnf2)

DISC-SYSCONF-001 + DISC-SYSCONF-002: fl::sysconf and fl::pathconf
returned static POSIX minimums for limits that vary at runtime,
diverging from glibc which queries the live system.

Fixes:
- _SC_CHILD_MAX: query RLIMIT_NPROC via sys_getrlimit (matches glibc)
- _SC_STREAM_MAX: return FOPEN_MAX = 16 (matches glibc)
- _PC_LINK_MAX: dispatch via sys_statfs / sys_fstatfs on f_type magic
  (EXT*=65000, BTRFS=65535, XFS=INT32_MAX, NFS=32000, tmpfs/ramfs=32767,
  proc/sys=1, default=127 / LINUX_LINK_MAX)

conformance_diff_sysconf updated to assert strict equality with glibc
(no longer documented divergence). 8 tests pass.

Closes bd-cnf2 (was DISC-SYSCONF-001 + DISC-SYSCONF-002).
